11 / 12 — ALTAN NEXUS

City Context

The dialogue between Altan Nexus and the city of Skopje.

Back to Portfolio ALTAN NEXUS — 11 / 12
Urban Dialogue

City Context

Altan Nexus in the city of Skopje — a dialogue between the new and the historic.

Skopje is a city of contradictions — ancient bazaars and Soviet housing blocks, Baroque statues and modernist towers, a river that both divides and connects. Altan Nexus enters this conversation with humility and ambition simultaneously.

The project does not attempt to dominate the skyline or compete with the historic monuments. Instead, it frames them — creating a new backdrop that makes the historic city more legible, and a new foreground that draws the eye toward the river.

Orientation & positioning — solar path and zoning

ENSolar path, wind orientation and programme zoning in context.
SQRruga diellore, orientimi i erës dhe zonizimi i programit.
МКСончева патека, ориентација на ветерот и зонирање.

Historic Bazaar

The muted facade reads as a backdrop to the Čaršija — reflecting, not competing with, the bazaar's rich texture.

Vardar River

Riverfront terraces and new pedestrian connections revitalise the city's relationship with water.

New Landmark

Visible from Vodno Mountain, the building ensemble becomes a new marker for 21st-century Skopje.

Environmental Strategy

Microclimate & Site

Microclimate plan — wind, shade, cooling and light

ENSite plan showing dominant wind direction, shaded zones, natural cooling, and daylight penetration.
SQPlani i sitit me drejtimin e erës, zonat me hije dhe ftohjen natyrore.
МКСитуациски план со насока на ветерот, зони со сенка и природно ладење.

Green roof & atrium — environmental and social benefits

ENAerial view of the green roof and central atrium with social zones, terraces, and circulating water feature.
SQPamje ajrore e çatisë jeshile dhe atriumit qendror me zona sociale dhe ujë cirkulues.
МКАеријален поглед на зелениот покрив и централниот атриум со социјални зони.
Passive Design

Energy & Climate Strategy

Passive strategies — sun, wind, water and greenery in section

ENComprehensive section showing solar control, natural ventilation, rainwater harvesting and green roofs.
SQSeksion gjithëpërfshirës me kontrollin diellor, ventilimin natyror dhe çatitë jeshile.
МКСеопфатен пресек со сончева контрола, природна вентилација и зелени покриви.

Solar shading — section perspective

ENSection showing how the facade controls solar gain in summer and winter.
SQSeksion i kontrollit të rrezeve diellore në verë dhe dimër.
МКПресек на контролата на сончевото зрачење лето и зима.

Natural ventilation — air movement through floors

ENStack effect drives fresh air through the building via the central atrium.
SQEfekti i kaminit çon ajrin e freskët nëpër ndërtesë nëpërmjet atriumit.
МКОџачки ефект воведува свеж воздух низ зградата преку атриумот.

Passive strategies — detailed building section

ENDetailed section with programme layout, self-shading facade and passive ventilation.
SQSeksion i detajuar me planimetrinë, fasadën vetë-hijesuese dhe ventilimin pasiv.
МКДетален пресек со програма, самосенечка фасада и пасивна вентилација.

Rainwater harvesting — collection and reuse cycle

ENRainwater collected from the roof is filtered and reused for irrigation and sanitation.
SQUji i shiut mblidhet nga çatia, filtrohet dhe ripërdoret për vaditje dhe sanitare.
МКДождовната вода се собира, филтрира и повторно користи за наводнување и санитарии.
